project.description: Upload PIC-SURE Visualization template file (.tftpl) to S3 for use by the Render PIC-SURE Visualization Config Template job.

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: TARGET_STACK
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Target stack identifier (e.g., a, b). Leave empty to upload to the shared template path.

hudson.model.FileParameterDefinition.name: visualization.env.tftpl
hudson.model.FileParameterDefinition.description: Upload a visualization.env.tftpl file. This template is rendered with environment-specific values during deployment.

hudson.tasks.Shell.command:
#!/bin/bash set -e
source_scripts_folder="${JENKINS_HOME}/workspace/Bash_Functions/" for script_file in "$source_scripts_folder"*.sh; do chmod +x "$script_file" if [ -f "$script_file" ] && [ -x "$script_file" ]; then echo "sourcing $script_file" source "$script_file" fi done
if [ -n "${TARGET_STACK}" ]; then S3_PREFIX="configs/pic-sure-visualization/templates/${TARGET_STACK}" echo "Uploading to stack-specific path: ${S3_PREFIX}/" else S3_PREFIX="configs/pic-sure-visualization/templates" echo "Uploading to shared path: ${S3_PREFIX}/" fi
if [ -f visualization.env.tftpl ]; then aws s3 --sse=AES256 cp visualization.env.tftpl "s3://$stack_s3_bucket/${S3_PREFIX}/visualization.env.tftpl" echo "Uploaded visualization.env.tftpl" else echo "No visualization.env.tftpl file provided, skipping." fi
